Service 05 — Video

Video and Reel Production Services in Guwahati.

Video stopped being optional a long time ago. It is what people watch, share, and remember - especially short-form reels that can build reach and recall fast.

Discuss This Service All Services

What this service covers

Stories that land in seconds.

At Colours and Patterns, our video and reel production is for brands across Guwahati, the North-East, and the rest of India who want to tell their story in a way that lands in seconds, not paragraphs.

The full process is handled in-house: concept, script, shoot, edit, and post. The work covers brand films, product videos, founder stories, explainers, customer testimonials, behind-the-scenes content, reels, Shorts, and full ad campaigns.

Sometimes the brief is a 15-second hook meant to stop the thumb mid-scroll. Other times it is a two-minute brand film that needs to make someone feel something about the business. The same care goes into both.

Everything is cut for where it will live: vertical for reels and Shorts, square for feed posts, widescreen for YouTube and websites, and captioned versions because most people watch on mute.

Trending audio is used when it makes sense for the brand. A real story sits underneath when it does not. That is the difference between a video that gets forgotten and one that gets saved, shared, and remembered.

What we do

  • Concept, script, shoot, edit, and post-production handled end to end
  • Brand films, product videos, founder stories, explainers, testimonials, and BTS content
  • Reels, Shorts, social videos, website videos, and full ad campaign assets
  • Vertical, square, and widescreen edits prepared for each platform
  • Captions, hooks, covers, trending audio when relevant, and story-led packaging

Deliverables

  • Concepts
  • Scripts
  • Shoot
  • Edits
  • Captions
  • Platform cuts
